mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.invoice_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, order_id, order_number, invoice_number, customer_id, customer_name, customer_email, total_amount, tax_amount, subtotal, shipping_amount, discount_amount, status, gstin, billing_address, shipping_address, created_time ) SELECT inv.id, inv.tenant, NOW(), inv.order_id, COALESCE(o.order_number, ''), inv.invoice_number, COALESCE(o.customer_id, ''), COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || COALESCE(u.last_name, ''), ''), COALESCE(u.email, ''), COALESCE(inv.total_amount, 0), COALESCE(inv.tax_amount, 0), COALESCE(o.subtotal, 0), COALESCE(o.shipping_amount, 0), COALESCE(o.discount_amount, 0), inv.status, inv.gstin, COALESCE(ba.address_line1 || ', ' || ba.city || ' ' || ba.postal_code, ''), COALESCE(sa.address_line1 || ', ' || sa.city || ' ' || sa.postal_code, ''), inv.created_time FROM hm_invoice.invoices inv LEFT JOIN hm_order.orders o ON inv.order_id = o.id LEFT JOIN hm_user.user_profiles u ON o.customer_id = u.id LEFT JOIN hm_order.order_addresses ba ON ba.order_id = o.id AND ba.address_type = 'BILLING' LEFT JOIN hm_order.order_addresses sa ON sa.order_id = o.id AND sa.address_type = 'SHIPPING'
